zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Hamerton於1412年出生在英國越可爾維格萊斯沃斯時，她的父親Sir Laurence Hamerton32歲，母親Isabel Tempest29歲。她於1420年與Richard II Sherburne在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1462年在她的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Hamerton于1412年出生在英国越可爾維格萊斯沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Laurence Hamerton32岁，母亲Isabel Tempest29岁。她于1420年与Richard II Sherburne在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1462年在她的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hamerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hammerton
meanings: English: habitational name, usually from Hammerton Green (Yorkshire) and occasionally perhaps from Hamerton (Huntingdonshire), each of which probably derives from Old English hamor, denoting some sort of plant such as hammer-wort, + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Hamerton was born in 1412, in Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Laurence Hamerton, was 32 and her mother, Isabel Tempest, was 29. She married Richard II Sherburne in 1420, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1462, in her hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Hamerton est née en 1412, à Wigglesworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Laurence Hamerton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel Tempest, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard II Sherburne en 1420, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1462, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Hamerton 1412 in Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Laurence Hamerton 32 und ihre Mutter Isabel Tempest 29. Sie hat 1420 in Yorkshire, England Richard II Sherburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1462 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Hamerton è nata il nel 1412 nel Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Laurence Hamerton, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Isabel Tempest, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Richard II Sherburne nel 1420, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1462, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Hamertonが1412年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィググレスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Laurence Hamertonは32歳，母Isabel Tempestは29歳であった。1420年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRichard II Sherburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1462年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Hamerton(이)가 1412년 영국 요르크실르 위글레스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Laurence Hamerton(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Tempest(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 요르크실르에서 Richard II Sherburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1462년 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Hamerton nasceu em 1412, em Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Laurence Hamerton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Tempest, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard II Sherburne em 1420, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1462, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Hamerton родилась в 1412 г. в местности виглесворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Laurence Hamerton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Tempest, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard II Sherburne в 1420 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1462 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Hamerton nació en 1412, en Wigglesworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Laurence Hamerton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel Tempest, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Richard II Sherburne en 1420, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1462, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
